name: python3-selenium
title: python3-selenium
description:
Python3 bindings for Selenium
Python3 language bindings for Selenium WebDriver.
.
The `selenium` package is used automate web browser interaction from Python.
Several browsers/drivers are supported (Chrome, Chromium, Edge, Firefox,
Internet Explorer and Safari), as well as the Remote protocol.
.
The webdriver parts itself are not included in this package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-selenium because Python3 bindings for Selenium.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-selenium as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-selenium with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-selenium --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
